new_classes.label_en: Other spirituous beverages in containers > 2 L (subheading 2208 90 69)
new_classes.label_de: Andere alkoholhaltige Getränke in Behältnissen mit mehr als 2 L (Unterposition 2208 90 69)
new_classes.definition_en: Other spirituous beverages of subheading 2208 90 69, in containers holding more than 2 litres, including spirituous beverages with added aerated water (e.g. whisky-soda), tea with alcohol, mixtures of spirituous beverages with each other or with fruit or vegetable juices, and other beverages listed in HS Explanatory Note to heading 2208, third paragraph, items 14–18.

new_classes.label_en: Aerated water added quality (spirituous beverage to which aerated/soda water has been added)
new_classes.label_de: Eigenschaft 'mit Sodawasser versetzt' (alkoholhaltiges Getränk, dem Sodawasser zugefügt wurde)
new_classes.definition_en: Quality borne by a spirituous beverage that has had aerated water (soda water) added to it, e.g. whisky-soda; used to discriminate subheading 2208 90 69 from other spirits subheadings.

new_classes.label_en: Tea with alcohol quality (beverage consisting of tea combined with ethyl alcohol or a spirit)
new_classes.label_de: Eigenschaft 'Tee mit Alkohol' (Getränk aus Tee kombiniert mit Ethylalkohol oder einem Branntwein)
new_classes.definition_en: Quality borne by a beverage produced by combining tea with ethyl alcohol or a distilled spirit; classifiable under subheading 2208 90 69.

new_classes.label_en: Mixture of spirituous beverages or spirituous beverages mixed with fruit/vegetable juice quality
new_classes.label_de: Eigenschaft 'Mischung alkoholhaltiger Getränke oder Mischung mit Frucht-/Gemüsesäften'
new_classes.definition_en: Quality borne by a beverage consisting of two or more spirituous beverages mixed together, or a spirituous beverage mixed with fruit or vegetable juices; classifiable under subheading 2208 90 69.

coverage_explanation:
The proposed axioms cover the main distinguishing criteria for CN 2208 90 69:
1. The product class OtherSpiritousBeverages22089069 is positioned as a subclass of SpiritsBeverages2208 (heading 2208), and is restricted to containers > 2 L via the existing LargeContainer class.
2. Three new quality classes are introduced to capture the three explicitly enumerated product types: (a) spirituous beverages with added aerated/soda water, (b) tea with alcohol, and (c) mixtures of spirituous beverages with each other or with fruit/vegetable juices.
3. The NotSpiritousBeverageQuality restriction is used to signal the residual/catch-all nature of this subheading (it covers spirituous beverages not classifiable under specific subheadings 2208 20 12–2208 90 56/78).

GAPS / REDUCTIONS:
- The legal note references HS Explanatory Notes items (14) to (18), whose full content is not reproduced here; these items may contain additional product types not fully modelled. This reduces coverage to ~0.72.
- The NotSpiritousBeverageQuality restriction re-purposed from the TBox may not perfectly align with the residual nature of this subheading; ideally a dedicated 'OtherSpiritousNotElsewherClassified' quality would be used, but to avoid over-proliferation the existing class is reused.
- The three new quality classes (AeratedWaterAddedQuality, TeaWithAlcoholQuality, MixtureOfSpiritousOrWithJuiceQuality) are defined but not yet attached as someValuesFrom restrictions to the product class, since the legal text lists them as examples of what the subheading 'also includes' rather than necessary conditions — adding them as necessary conditions would over-constrain the class. They are modelled as qualities to enable future instance-level annotation.
